name: Cortex XSOAR API
description: Palo Alto Networks Cortex XSOAR (formerly Demisto) is a Security Orchestration, Automation and Response (SOAR) platform. The REST API provides endpoints for managing incidents, indicators, playbooks, integrations, war rooms, evidence, users, roles, investigations, and automation scripts.
